response:
Sec. 1
[WRITE AN INEQUALITY TO DETERMINE THE RANGE OF SALES REVENUE X FOR WHICH PUBLISHER A'S OFFER IS MORE LUCRATIVE THAN PUBLISHER B'S OFFER]

Sec. 2
[THE INEQUALITY IS 3000 + 0.05X > 1500 + 0.10X]

Sec. 3
[TO SOLVE THIS INEQUALITY, SUBTRACT 1500 FROM BOTH SIDES TO GET 1500 + 0.05X > 0.10X]

Sec. 4
[THEN SUBTRACT 0.05X FROM BOTH SIDES TO GET 1500 > 0.05X]

Sec. 5
[THIS CAN BE REWRITTEN AS X < 1500 / 0.05]

Sec. 6
[CALCULATING 1500 / 0.05 GIVES X < 30000]

Sec. 7
[THE RANGE OF SALES REVENUE X FOR WHICH PUBLISHER A'S OFFER IS MORE LUCRATIVE IS BETWEEN 10000 AND 30000]

Sec. 8
[THIS MEANS THAT IF THE WRITER ANTICIPATES A TOTAL SALES REVENUE OF BETWEEN $10,000 AND $40,000, THEN PUBLISHER A'S OFFER IS MORE BENEFICIAL WHEN X IS LESS THAN $30,000]
